title: Uniface Anywhere
text: Uniface Anywhere Uniface Anywhere is a platform that delivers Uniface applications to virtually any computer connected to the Internet. It makes it possible to create a private cloud that allows authorized employees, business partners, and customers to securely access applications from anywhere, regardless of connection, location, client platform, or operating system. Uniface Anywhere is an excellent solution for bringing client/server Uniface applications to the Web, in cases where the number of users is known or can be controlled. It can be integrated and bundled with any Uniface application. Related Links Web Application Server The Uniface Web Application Server (WASV) handles server-side processing for web and mobile applications. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
